description: Comprehensive testing guidelines for Cursor including the 4 Pillars of Good Tests framework and TDD workflow. Covers test quality principles (Reliability, Validity, Sensitivity, Resilience), test-driven development practices with red-green-refactor cycle and test-first approach with meaningful-red discipline (structural failures like 404/missing-field are not valid reds; green-from-start allowed when no real red is possible), and guidance on when to use BDD (outer-loop behavior) vs TDD (inner-loop logic) under a shared test-first gate

files.description: The 4 Pillars of Good Tests framework with examples

Test-Driven Development guidelines with red-green-refactor cycle, meaningful-red test-first approach (scaffold structure first; green-from-start when no real red is possible), quality assurance practices, and BDD-vs-TDD guidance (BDD outer loop, TDD inner loop) under a shared test-first gate
